_meta.description: Finding-level baseline of PRE-EXISTING full-catalog editorial findings. Each entry suppresses exactly one finding (path + rule + normalized finding). Changed-file validation ignores this file and stays strict.
_meta.warning: Do not edit by hand. CI fails on findings not listed here and on stale (resolved) entries.
